title: Sealing Extermination Clan
content:
The 
Sealing Extermination Clan
 is an extremely strange clan. The elder of the clan takes members of the Sealing Extermination Clan during infancy to worship the ancestor. After worshiping the ancestor, they have three lives. The clan members aren't related by blood but captured babies, and if they survive worshipping the ancestor, they become part of the clan. During this process, the chance of death is very high, and a long time ago, the Sealing Extermination Clan’s alter disappeared. At the present day, there are very few Sealing Extermination Clan members remaining.

And because the clan mark is branded on them, they don't die even if they lose their clan mark, and even their cultivation level doesn't fall. They just no longer belong to the Sealing Extermination Clan.

What is noteworthy about the Sealing Extermination Clan, aside from their bizarre sealing spell, is their amazing three lives spell. This spell could be taken and used on someone else.
